# AirBit

> AirBit is an enterprise AI infrastructure platform for AI gateway, MCP gateway, guardrails, integration, and industry solutions.

## Canonical site
- https://www.tlin.cn/

## Core pages
- Home: https://www.tlin.cn/
- AirBit Portal: https://www.tlin.cn/airbit-portal
- AirBit AI Gateway: https://www.tlin.cn/airbit-ai-gateway
- AirBit MCP Gateway: https://www.tlin.cn/airbit-mcp-gateway
- AirBit Guardrails: https://www.tlin.cn/airbit-guardrails
- AirBit APIs: https://www.tlin.cn/airbit-apis
- AirBit EIPs: https://www.tlin.cn/airbit-eips
- AirBit AIO: https://www.tlin.cn/airbit-aio

## Industry solutions
- Manufacturing: https://www.tlin.cn/solution-manufacturing
- Fashion: https://www.tlin.cn/solution-fashion
- Food: https://www.tlin.cn/solution-food
- Education: https://www.tlin.cn/solution-education
- Public sector: https://www.tlin.cn/solution-public

## Company
- Company: https://www.tlin.cn/company
- Partner: https://www.tlin.cn/partner
- Contact: https://www.tlin.cn/contact
